title: Car Windscreen Cover - Magnetic Windshield Cover for Winter, Foldable Extra Thick, Heavy Duty Windscreen Protector for Frost/Ice/Snow/Sun - Fits Medium-Large Cars SUVs (Large)
features: MAGNETIC CAR WINDSHIELD COVER WINTER - On cold and snowy days, it’s a luxury to leave your house with a clean windshield. Avoid the hassle of defrosting and scraping the ice off your car's windscreen with this handy, waterproof, magnetic car windscreen cover for winter. Whether it’s snow, frost, hail, or summer sun, keep your windshield clean and clear with ease with this car windshield snow cover.

FOUR SEASON CAR SCREEN COVER - Whether you’re preparing for spring, summer, fall, or winter, this weatherproof magnetic windscreen protector frost has you covered! It’s perfect for snow, ice, wind, frost, and hail. Enjoy comprehensive visibility and vehicle safety all year round! This car window screen cover winter folds easily for storage in your boot or glove compartment, making it a practical companion for every season.

ULTRA-THICK LAYERED DESIGN – Each car frost windscreen cover includes four durable layers: PEVA aluminium foil, spun lace cotton, composite cotton, and a black non-woven lining. This heavy-duty car screen protector from ice is built to last, featuring three built-in magnets and windscreen wiper protection. It is extra thick, sturdy, and resistant to temperature, flames, and tears.

FOLDABLE AND EASY TO SET UP - To begin using this portable, compact car windscreen frost cover, simply unfold, place it over your windshield, and tuck the windproof ears inside the car doors on both sides. Once you’re done, simply fold away and store. This magnetic ice cover for car windscreen is designed to accommodate medium to large cars, SUVs, and trucks. Size: 153 x 127 cm.

UV PROTECTION - The aluminium reflective material on our car windscreen frost protector effectively blocks 99% of ultraviolet rays to keep your vehicle cool in hot and sunny weather. Also protects your vehicle's dashboard, car seats and steering wheel from heat damage. In spring and autumn, use this car window screen frost protector to keep fallen leaves, dust, and bird droppings off your windshield.
description: GADLANE Window Screen Cover for Winter, Summer, Spring, Autumn (153 x 127 cm) Protect your car year-round with this ultra-thick car windscreen covers frost protector. Designed for all seasons, it shields against snow, ice, frost, and water in winter, while providing UV and heat protection in summer. During spring and autumn, it prevents fallen leaves, dust, and bird droppings from dirtying your car. Built with four durable layers - PEVA aluminium foil, spun lace cotton, composite cotton, and a black non-woven lining - this heavy-duty car window cover ice protector is flame-resistant, tear-resistant, and ensures a clear windshield every day. The magnetised bottom with three built-in magnets and windscreen wiper protection keeps it stable even in strong winds. Setup is quick: unfold, place it over the windscreen, and tuck windproof ears into the doors. Lightweight and foldable, it’s easy to store in your glove compartment or boot. Suitable for most medium to large cars, SUVs, and trucks (Size: 153 x 127 cm), this windshield cover for ice and snow is your perfect companion for hassle-free car maintenance!
